MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Angela S. Rho, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, T:415.788.1900, counsel of defendant, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no opposition filed, and no appearance by defendant at the hearing, the Court ruled as follows: MURPHY PEARSON BRADLEY & FEENEY'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Defendant S&J MAINTENANCE LLC is GRANTED. Moving party to prepare and submit by email a proposed order listing the defendant's current address and the future hearing date(s) in this case. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
